title: AI Financial Advisor
subtitle: Powered by Ollama • Ask me about your finances

unavailable.title: AI Service Unavailable
unavailable.description: The Ollama AI service is not available. Please make sure Ollama is running and try again.

welcome.title: Welcome to Your AI Financial Advisor
welcome.description: I can help you analyze your spending, create budgets, optimize investments, and provide personalized financial advice based on your actual financial data.

sendError: Failed to send message. Please try again.
processingError: Sorry, I encountered an error processing your request. Please try again.
networkError: The AI service is temporarily unreachable. Please check your connection and try again.
serverError: The AI service encountered an internal error. Please try again in a moment.

analyzeSpending.label: Analyze My Spending
analyzeSpending.question: Can you analyze my spending patterns and tell me where most of my money is going?

budgetRecommendations.label: Budget Recommendations
budgetRecommendations.question: Based on my income and expenses, what budget recommendations do you have for me?

investmentPerformance.label: Investment Performance
investmentPerformance.question: How is my investment portfolio performing? What are my best and worst performers?

debtStrategy.label: Debt Strategy
debtStrategy.question: What strategy should I follow to pay off my debts most efficiently?

savingsGoals.label: Savings Goals
savingsGoals.question: How much should I be saving each month to reach my financial goals?

cashFlowAnalysis.label: Cash Flow Analysis
cashFlowAnalysis.question: What does my cash flow look like? Am I spending more than I earn?

financialSummary.label: Financial Summary
financialSummary.question: Can you give me an overall summary of my current financial situation?

moneySavingTips.label: Money-Saving Tips
moneySavingTips.question: What are some practical tips to reduce my expenses and save more money?
